message:
feat(run): wire deep scan signals into interactive TUI mode

- Replace stub warning with actual deep scan integration when --deep flag
  is passed to `pt run` in interactive mode
- Add DeepSignals struct to hold per-process network/IO activity indicators
- Implement collect_deep_signals() that runs deep_scan on Linux to gather
  socket counts, listen ports, and I/O activity
- Pass deep_signals to build_tui_rows() so the TUI can display network-active
  and IO-active badges on processes
- Deep scan failures log to stderr but don't abort the TUI session

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
